note: Auto-extracted from QC PDF via pdf-parse. "raw" preserves verbatim PDF text per case for traceability; refine desc/steps/expected during component automation.

testcases.description: Verify images of various dimensions upload without distortion or cropping in Image Labeling.
testcases.expected: Drag image labeling Upload images of varying dimensions All image sizes should upload successfully without distortion or cropping
testcases.raw: TC_01Image LabelingFunctional Verify images of various dimensions upload without distortion or cropping in Image Labeling. 1. Create activity and start authoring 2.Create multipart component 3.Drag image labeling Upload images of varying dimensions All image sizes should upload successfully without distortion or cropping

testcases.description: Validate only supported image extensions (.jpg, .svg, . png) upload successfully; unsupported formats rejected.Upload images with extensions: .Jpg, .Svg, .png. All supported extensions should upload without error; unsupp
testcases.raw: TC_02Image LabelingFunctional Validate only supported image extensions (.jpg, .svg, . png) upload successfully; unsupported formats rejected.Upload images with extensions: .Jpg, .Svg, .png. All supported extensions should upload without error; unsupported formats should be rejected

testcases.description: Image LabelingBoundary Ensure a maximum of 20 labels can be added in Image Labeling; restrict adding the 21st label.Add labels incrementally up to 20 System should allow exactly 20 labels; 21st label should be restricted
testcases.raw: TC_03Image LabelingBoundary Ensure a maximum of 20 labels can be added in Image Labeling; restrict adding the 21st label.Add labels incrementally up to 20 System should allow exactly 20 labels; 21st label should be restricted

testcases.description: Verify labels of both Text and Number types are added and displayed correctly.Add labels using both Text and Number types Labels should reflect correct type and display accordingly
testcases.raw: TC_04Image LabelingFunctional Verify labels of both Text and Number types are added and displayed correctly.Add labels using both Text and Number types Labels should reflect correct type and display accordingly

testcases.description: Ensure settings panel in Image Labeling remains fixed and visible during component scroll. Open settings panel and scroll through the component Settings panel should remain fixed and visible during scroll
testcases.raw: TC_05Image LabelingUI Ensure settings panel in Image Labeling remains fixed and visible during component scroll. Open settings panel and scroll through the component Settings panel should remain fixed and visible during scroll

testcases.description: Check that toggling "Show Instruction" reflects immediately on the image component. Toggle “Show Instruction” from settings and observe image component Instruction text should appear/disappear based on toggle state
testcases.raw: TC_06Image LabelingFunctional Check that toggling "Show Instruction" reflects immediately on the image component. Toggle “Show Instruction” from settings and observe image component Instruction text should appear/disappear based on toggle state

testcases.description: Verify "Show Arrow" toggle shows or hides arrow on image component as expected. Toggle “Show Arrow” from settings and observe image component Arrow should appear/disappear based on toggle state
testcases.raw: TC_07Image LabelingFunctional Verify "Show Arrow" toggle shows or hides arrow on image component as expected. Toggle “Show Arrow” from settings and observe image component Arrow should appear/disappear based on toggle state

testcases.description: Verify "Show Header" toggle shows or hides header on image component as expected. Toggle “Show Header” from settings and observe image component Header should appear/disappear based on toggle state
testcases.raw: TC_08Image LabelingFunctional Verify "Show Header" toggle shows or hides header on image component as expected. Toggle “Show Header” from settings and observe image component Header should appear/disappear based on toggle state

testcases.description: Confirm that style changes in settings are reflected immediately on the Image Labeling component.Apply different styles from the availabel styles. Image labeling component should reflect selected styles immediately
testcases.raw: TC_09Image LabelingUI Confirm that style changes in settings are reflected immediately on the Image Labeling component.Apply different styles from the availabel styles. Image labeling component should reflect selected styles immediately

testcases.description: Verify multiple tags can be added in settings and are displayed correctly in the component.Click “Add Tags” in settings and input multiple tags Tags should be added and displayed correctly in the component
testcases.raw: TC_10Image LabelingFunctional Verify multiple tags can be added in settings and are displayed correctly in the component.Click “Add Tags” in settings and input multiple tags Tags should be added and displayed correctly in the component

testcases.description: Ensure special characters and symbols are accepted and rendered in all text input fields.
testcases.raw: TC_11Image LabelingFunctional Ensure special characters and symbols are accepted and rendered in all text input fields. Enter text, special characters, and symbols in Header, Instruction, Question, Caption boxes All characters should be accepted and rendered correctly

testcases.raw: TC_12Image LabelingFunctional Validate replacing the image with a smaller or larger one updates correctly without layout issues.Replace existing image with smaller/larger image New image should replace old one and render correctly without layout issues
